mxCell.value:
<<entity>>
Admin

- id : UUID

- firstName : String

- lastName : String

- email : String

- passwordHash : String

- role : AdminRole

- departmentId : Integer

- avatarUrl : String

- isActive : Boolean

- lastLoginAt : LocalDateTime

- createdAt : LocalDateTime

- updatedAt : LocalDateTime*

+ getFullName() : String

+ isAdmin() : Boolean

+ isSuperAdmin() : Boolean

@Table("admins")

@UniqueConstraint(email)

<<entity>>
Department

- id : Integer

- name : String

- description : String

- isActive : Boolean

- createdAt : LocalDateTime

- updatedAt : LocalDateTime

+ hasActiveEmployees() : Boolean

+ getEmployeeCount() : Integer

@Table("departments")

@UniqueConstraint(name)

<<entity>>
Employee

- id : Integer

- internalId : String

- firstName : String

- lastName : String

- email : String

- departmentId : Integer

- hasAccess : Boolean

- isActive : Boolean

- isInside : Boolean

- enteredAt : LocalDateTime

- createdAt : LocalDateTime

- updatedAt : LocalDateTime

+ getFullName() : String

+ canEnter() : Boolean

+ togglePresence() : void

@Table("employees")

@UniqueConstraint(internalId)

@Index(departmentId, isInside)

<<entity>>

AccessLog

- id : Long

- employeeId : Integer (nullable)

- internalIdRaw : String

- result : AccessResult

- accessedAt : LocalDateTime

- notes : String

+ isGranted() : Boolean

+ isDenied() : Boolean

@Table("access_logs")

@Index(employeeId, accessedAt)

ON DELETE SET NULL (employeeId)

<<entity>>

RoomSettings

- id : Integer

- maxCapacity : Integer

- maxStayMinutes : Integer

- alertThresholdPct : Integer

- updatedAt : LocalDateTime

- updatedBy : UUID

+ isAtCapacity(current) : Boolean

+ isAtAlert(current) : Boolean

@Table("room_settings") singleton

@Trigger: enforce 1 row only

<<entity>>

AdminActionLog

- id : Long

- adminId : UUID (nullable)

- adminEmail : String

- action : AuditAction

- entityName : String

- entityId : String

- description : String

- oldValue : JsonNode

- newValue : JsonNode

- ipAddress : String

- createdAt : LocalDateTime

+ getSummary() : String

@Table("admin_action_log")

@Index(adminId, createdAt)

READ ONLY from application

ON DELETE SET NULL (adminId)

Populated via Spring AOP

<<entity>>

PasswordResetToken

- id : UUID

- adminId : UUID

- token : String

- expiresAt : LocalDateTime

- used : Boolean

- createdAt : LocalDateTime

+ isExpired() : Boolean

+ isValid() : Boolean

@Table("password_reset_tokens")

@UniqueConstraint(token)

ON DELETE CASCADE (adminId)

<<enum>>

AccessResult

GRANTED

DENIED_NO_PERMISSION

DENIED_NOT_FOUND · DENIED_MAX_CAPACITY

<<enum>>

AdminRole

ROLE_ADMIN-ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN

<<enum>>

AuditAction

CREATE-UPDATE-DELETE
LOGIN-LOGOUT-EXPORT
